goals: Calculate potential future returns on an initial investment for agricultural technology adoption
Compare investment returns across different interest rate scenarios for rural tech projects
Calculate discounts on bulk agricultural equipment purchases
Determine appropriate pricing for agricultural consulting services using markup

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical, approaches problems with academic rigor but remains open to exploring different scenarios. Prefers structured comparisons to inform research conclusions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Comfortable with basic financial concepts for research analysis but does not have specialized finance training. Understands the purpose of the calculations needed but may need guidance on specific tool selection.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations needed for their agricultural technology research analysis and has compared the relevant scenarios.
